channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in PHP (Weekly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in PHP nel periodo weekly.

💻 Linguaggio: PHP

item.title: 🐘 malikad778/wp-hook-check (10 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: malikad778

📝 Repository: malikad778/wp-hook-check

📄 Descrizione: Static analysis for WordPress hooks. Detect orphaned listeners, unheard hooks, and typos in actions and filters without running WordPress. Faster, safer WP development.

⭐ Stelle: 10

🍴 Forks: 0

💻 Linguaggio: PHP
